name: Ferret Flames
name_jp: イタチの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>暴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぼう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>発</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If the combined ATK of all face-up monsters your opponent controls is higher than your LP: Make your opponent shuffle face-up monsters they control into the Deck (their choice), except monsters with 0 ATK, so that the combined ATK of the remaining monsters they control becomes less than or equal to your LP.
eff: If the combined ATK of all face-up monsters your opponent controls is higher than your LP: Make your opponent shuffle face-up monsters they control into the Deck (their choice), except monsters with 0 ATK, so that the combined ATK of the remaining monsters they control becomes less than or equal to your LP.

sets.set: Structure Deck: Legend of the Crystal Beasts

action: Makes your opponent return cards from the field to the Deck
